argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const sku = '{{ sku }}'; const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; const capturePattern = 'api.m.jd.com/client.action'; const maxScrollAttempts = 100; const scrollDelay = 2000; const DISGUISE_FN = ` function __disguise(fn, name) { const nativeStr = 'function ' + name + '() { [native code] }'; const _origToString = Function.prototype.toString; const _patchedFns = window.__dFns || (function() { const m = new Map(); return override !== undefined ? override : _origToString.call(this); }, writable: true, configurable: true }); return m; })(); _patchedFns.set(fn, nativeStr); try { Object.defineProperty(fn, 'name', { value: name, configurable: true }); } catch {} return fn; }`; const allComments = []; let captureResolve; let lastCaptureTime = 0; eval(DISGUISE_FN); const origFetch = window.fetch; window.fetch = __disguise(async function(...fetchArgs) { const resp = await origFetch.apply(this, fetchArgs); try { const url = typeof fetchArgs[0] === 'string' ? fetchArgs[0] : fetchArgs[0] instanceof Request ? fetchArgs[0].url : String(fetchArgs[0]); if (url.includes(capturePattern)) { const clonedResp = resp.clone(); const text = await clonedResp.text(); try { const data = JSON.parse(text); const floors = data?.result?.floors || []; const listFloor = floors.find(f => f.mId === 'commentlist-list'); const comments = listFloor?.data || []; if (comments.length > 0) { for (const c of comments) { const info = c?.commentInfo || {}; if (!allComments.find(x => x.commentId === info.commentId)) { allComments.push({ user: info.userNickName || '', content: (info.commentData || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), date: info.commentDate || '', commentId: info.commentId }); } } lastCaptureTime = Date.now(); if (captureResolve) captureResolve(); } } catch {} } } catch {} return resp; }, 'fetch'); const origXhrOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open; const origXhrSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = __disguise(function(method, url) { this._captureUrl = String(url); return origXhrOpen.apply(this, arguments); }, 'open'); XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = __disguise(function(body) { if (this._captureUrl?.includes(capturePattern)) { this.addEventListener('load', function() { try { const data = JSON.parse(this.responseText); const floors = data?.result?.floors || []; const listFloor = floors.find(f => f.mId === 'commentlist-list'); const comments = listFloor?.data || []; if (comments.length > 0) { for (const c of comments) { const info = c?.commentInfo || {}; if (!allComments.find(x => x.commentId === info.commentId)) { allComments.push({ user: info.userNickName || '', content: (info.commentData || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(), date: info.commentDate || '', commentId: info.commentId }); } } lastCaptureTime = Date.now(); if (captureResolve) captureResolve(); } } catch {} }); } return origXhrSend.apply(this, arguments); }, 'send'); try { for (let scroll = 0; scroll < 8; scroll++) { window.scrollTo(0, scroll * 600); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const allBtn = document.querySelector('div.all-btn') || Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div')).find(el => el.classList.contains('all-btn') || el.querySelector('.all-btn')); if (allBtn) { allBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); if (allComments.length < limit) { const rateList = document.querySelector('[class*=rateListContainer]'); if (rateList) { let prevScrollTop = 0; let noNewDataCount = 0; const maxNoNewData = 3; for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxScrollAttempts && allComments.length < limit; attempt++) { const prevCount = allComments.length; const maxScrollTop = rateList.scrollHeight - rateList.clientHeight; rateList.scrollTop = rateList.scrollHeight; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, scrollDelay)); captureResolve = null; const waitPromise = new Promise(r => { captureResolve = r; }); await Promise.race([waitPromise, new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, scrollDelay))]); if (rateList.scrollTop >= maxScrollTop - 10 && prevScrollTop >= maxScrollTop - 10) { if (allComments.length === prevCount) { noNewDataCount++; if (noNewDataCount >= maxNoNewData) { break; } } else { noNewDataCount = 0; } } else { noNewDataCount = 0; } prevScrollTop = rateList.scrollTop; } } } } finally { window.fetch = origFetch; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = origXhrOpen; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = origXhrSend; } return { comments: allComments.slice(0, limit), sku, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (!intermediate.comments || intermediate.comments.length === 0) return []; const limit = intermediate.limit || 10; const results = intermediate.comments.slice(0, limit).map((item, i) => ({ rank: i + 1, user: item.user, content: item.content.slice(0, 200), date: item.date })); return results; }
